original_statement: "Germany project more than eight group stage goals, one of the highest in the tournament, with a 97% qualification rate. The second spot is competitive: Ivory Coast project slightly more goals than Ecuador (3.5 vs 3.3) despite a lower qualify probability (57.9% vs 72.9%), reflecting a better attacking projection that doesn't fully overcome the points gap [RotoWire model, 26 May 2026]."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group E second-place ordering
statement_context: Excerpt from RotoWire model projections for all 48 teams published on 2026-05-26. Author Adam Zdroik with stated model basis for goals, points and qualification odds.
resolution_criteria: Ecuador finishes ahead of Ivory Coast in the official FIFA Group E standings per the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-25.
source_text_snippet: The second spot is competitive: Ivory Coast project slightly more goals than Ecuador (3.5 vs 3.3) despite a lower qualify probability (57.9% vs 72.9%), reflecting a better attacking projection that doesn't fully overcome the points gap.
